nasb.text: “Son of man, prophesy against the prophets of Israel who prophesy, and say to those who prophesy from their own inspiration, ‘Listen to the word of the Lord!

esv.text: “Son of man, prophesy against the prophets of Israel, who are prophesying, and say to those who prophesy from their own hearts: ‘Hear the word of the Lord!’

cnv.text: “人子啊！你要說預言攻擊那些在以色列中說預言的先知，對那些隨著自己心意說預言的人說：‘你們要聽耶和華的話。’”

ccb.text: “人子啊，你要说预言斥责以色列那些说预言的先知，告诉那些私自发预言的人，‘你们要听耶和华的话。
